hook: Ask your dad one question tonight.

beats.text: Ask what he was like at 25 — before he was your dad.
Lock it for a grandchild who isn’t born yet.
You don’t know the year he almost quit.
Or what he was afraid of at thirty.
The stories don’t survive on their own.
Record one before it’s only yours to guess at.

hook: One day you’ll forget the sound of her voice.

beats.text: Not the face. The face is in every photo.
Record three minutes of her telling one story.
A grandchild not born yet will hear it.

hook: Your grandparents lived a whole life before you.

beats.text: Ask them about the version of themselves you never met.
What did they want at twenty?
Lock it into a thread that outlives all of you.
